title: cota coelopoda var. bourgaei
intro: Cota coelopoda var. bourgaei, also known as Bourgaei Mountain everlasting, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Cota coelopoda var. bourgaei include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, from respiratory issues to skin irritations.
